refs.purpose: Interpret nf-test profiles, snapshot assertions, and Nextflow fixture conventions before translating them.
refs.trigger: When converting nf_tests, snapshot fixtures, test profiles, or source test-data references into a Galaxy workflow test plan.
refs.verification: Translate nf-core/bacass nf-test snapshots into a Galaxy test plan and confirm this note improves profile/snapshot extraction.

refs.purpose: Interpret nf-test profiles, snapshot assertions, and Nextflow fixture conventions before translating them.
refs.trigger: When converting nf_tests, snapshot fixtures, test profiles, or source test-data references into a Galaxy workflow test plan.

refs.purpose: Distinguish accepted IWC-style test shortcuts from assertion smells while translating tests.
refs.trigger: When deciding whether to use existence-only, size-only, image-dimension, or tolerant output checks.

refs.purpose: Emit Galaxy/IWC-style job input fixtures, remote locations, hashes, and collection input shapes.
refs.trigger: When writing job inputs or deciding whether fixtures belong in test-data, Zenodo, ENA/SRA, or CVMFS.

refs.purpose: Translate nf-test snapshot captures, helper-pruned file lists, and snapshot checksums into Galaxy workflow-test assertion intent.
refs.trigger: When converting nf-test snapshot fixtures, .snap sidecars, ignore files, ignore globs, or pipeline-level stable path/name captures.

refs.purpose: Describe Galaxy workflow-test assertion intent and tolerances for translated expected outputs.
refs.trigger: When turning Nextflow expected outputs or snapshots into Galaxy test-plan assertions.

refs.purpose: Output contract: the emitted plan conforms to [[galaxy-workflow-test-plan]]. Cast bundles the JSON Schema; validate with `foundry validate-galaxy-workflow-test-plan`.
refs.verification: Cast the skill on an nf-core/bacass summary and confirm the emitted YAML validates and downstream [[implement-galaxy-workflow-test]] consumes it.

refs.purpose: Use the Galaxy workflow tests schema as the assertion vocabulary when translating Nextflow test evidence into a Galaxy test plan.
refs.trigger: When mapping expected outputs, tolerances, snapshots, or fixture assertions into Galaxy workflow-test assertion intent.

refs.purpose: Read summarized nf-test profiles, snapshot fixtures, selected test data, params, and expected outputs.

produces.description: Reviewable Galaxy workflow test plan (see [[galaxy-workflow-test-plan]]): profile, fixture, snapshot, ignored-file, expected-output, rationale provenance translated from nf-test evidence.

consumes.description: Structured Nextflow summary from [[summarize-nextflow]]; carries test_fixtures, nf_tests, snapshot evidence.
